patch.value: Domain-by-domain SDK promotion under pm-usfg covers read (pm-rjqr), lifecycle (pm-98cz), schema/config/profile (pm-3mna), history maintenance (pm-4a7m), plan (pm-je50), governance/health/gc (pm-oxrw), annotations (pm-zwpp), and execution (pm-oslr) — but nobody owns the package/extension platform family. The universal-tool story (pm-w89s, exemplar pm-cbwg) requires an SDK-built PM tool to install and manage packages without shelling to the CLI. Promote the install/upgrade/extension lifecycle logic (multi-target install aggregation, managed-extensions.json state, activation) behind typed SDK primitives, and align with the CLI-side consolidation pm-tnud so the noun rename and the SDK promotion do not conflict.
Promote package & extension lifecycle primitives to the public SDK: install, upgrade, extension list/enable/disable, managed-package state

SDK exports typed primitives for package install/upgrade and extension lifecycle (list, enable/disable, managed-extensions state) returning the same structured results the CLI renders; pm install/upgrade/extension/package commands consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change (install/extension specs green)

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Promote package and extension lifecycle operations into the public SDK so custom PM tools can install, upgrade, activate, deactivate, inspect, and manage packages without shelling out to CLI-only internals.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: promoted package/extension lifecycle primitives into the public SDK via PmClient and top-level helpers; exported ExtensionCommandResult/Options and UpgradeResult/Options; documented SDK lifecycle usage; added focused SDK package lifecycle tests. Verification passed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm quality:docs-skills, pnpm test:coverage (5455 tests, 100/100/100/100), pnpm changelog:pm:check (pm-changelog 2026.7.6, CHANGELOG unchanged), pnpm audit --audit-level high (no known vulnerabilities), pm health --check-only --summary (ok), pm validate history drift ok with pre-existing closed-item resolution warnings. Manual temp tarball install passed SDK packageList/package/catalog/doctor/upgrade proof.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Review evidence: pre-push Greptile review cb62f157 flagged two SDK/gate polish issues; fixed both by making packageDoctor options-only at the public SDK call site and renaming mixed expected Sentry exemptions to ignored_expected_handled_*. Follow-up Greptile reviews 6ce1e4da and 1a754263 returned no review comments; also enforced package vocabulary after caller options so pm.package(...) cannot be downgraded to extension vocabulary.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Final verification evidence before PR: pnpm test:coverage passed 265 files / 5455 tests with 100% statements, branches, functions, and lines; temp tarball install in /tmp verified SDK packageList/package/packageLifecycle/catalog/packageDoctor/upgrade through @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk; pm health ok with warning_count=0; pm validate history drift ok with only pre-existing closed-item resolution warnings.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Review follow-up: Gemini suggested enforcing package vocabulary across all package lifecycle SDK paths. Fixed the SDK alias resolver so package-* action aliases force vocabulary=package after merging caller options, covering lower-level runAction/client.run calls in addition to PmClient.package(...). Added regression coverage with a conflicting vocabulary override on package-describe. Verification passed: focused SDK package lifecycle test, pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, and pnpm test:coverage 5455 tests with 100/100/100/100.

Verification after fixes passed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm audit --audit-level high, pnpm quality:docs-skills, pnpm changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog 2026.7.6, pnpm test:coverage 5455 tests with 100/100/100/100, pnpm build, pm health warning_count=0, pm validate history drift ok with only pre-existing closed-item resolution warnings, pnpm sentry:telemetry:gate best-effort ok, and installed-package temp proof for package list/catalog/doctor/vocabulary guard/upgrade.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Bot review follow-up: Gemini identified that direct SDK calls to action=package could still pass vocabulary=extension because the guard only covered action aliases. Fixed resolveSdkActionInput to force vocabulary=package whenever the resolved action is package, including client.run/runAction direct paths, and added regression coverage for client.run("package", { target: "missing-package", options: { describe: true, vocabulary: "extension" } }). Verification passed: focused SDK lifecycle test, pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, and pnpm test:coverage 5455 tests with 100/100/100/100.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Installed-package proof after direct package guard fix: packed current checkout, installed it into a fresh /tmp project, initialized sandbox PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH, imported @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk, and verified packageList, packageLifecycle list, packageCatalog, packageDoctor isolated, dry-run upgrade, and direct client.run("package", { describe: true, vocabulary: "extension" }) still reports package vocabulary.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: CodeRabbit follow-up: tightened the public lifecycle type-contract test to assert every picked field for ExtensionCommandResult, PackageCommandResult, and UpgradeResult instead of only action. Verification passed: focused SDK lifecycle test, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm lint.
